name: popemkt-browser-ext
title: Browser Extension
description: Control your Browser Extension Chrome extension from Raycast
author: popemkt

commands.name: run-command
commands.title: Run Browser Extension Command
commands.description: Browse and execute Browser Extension extension commands

commands.name: reload-extension
commands.title: Dev: Reload Extension
commands.description: Reload the Chrome/Edge extension via the bridge

commands.name: build-extension
commands.title: Dev: Build Extension
commands.description: Build the Chrome extension from source

commands.name: build-and-reload
commands.title: Dev: Build & Reload Extension
commands.description: Build the extension then reload it in the browser
